scope: Manual operator runbook for the planned one-time 10,000 GCA member benefit transfer after support review and member ledger approval. This file does not make the benefit self-service claimable.

transferPolicy.registeredUserLimit: one member benefit transfer per approved registered user
transferPolicy.walletLimit: one verified Base wallet per registered user

approvalPrerequisites: controlled account record or manually reviewed registration packet exists
read-only ERC-20 balanceOf verifies at least 1,000,000 GCA at review time
recipient wallet is the same verified Base wallet from the approved review
no prior memberBenefitTransferTx exists for the same registered user

manualTransferSteps.label: Confirm review record
manualTransferSteps.operatorAction: Open the approved member review record and confirm registrationId, verified wallet, holdingStartDate, evidenceTxHash, evidenceTxHashFormatOk, holdingPeriodDaysVerified, and eligible status.

manualTransferSteps.label: Verify current balance
manualTransferSteps.operatorAction: Run a fresh read-only Base Mainnet ERC-20 balanceOf check for the verified wallet before preparing any transfer.

manualTransferSteps.label: Prepare reserve wallet
manualTransferSteps.operatorAction: Use the project or owner-held reserve wallet on Base Mainnet. Do not ask the user for private keys, seed phrases, custody, or fund transfers.

manualTransferSteps.label: Send member benefit
manualTransferSteps.operatorAction: Send exactly 10,000 GCA to the approved verified Base wallet. Confirm token contract and recipient before signing in the wallet.

manualTransferSteps.label: Record transfer
manualTransferSteps.operatorAction: After confirmation, record memberBenefitTransferTx, transferredAt, transferredAmount, sourceWallet, recipientWallet, and reviewerNote.

manualTransferSteps.label: Close review
manualTransferSteps.operatorAction: Set memberBenefitClaimStatus to transferred or closed only after the public transaction hash is recorded.

safeClaims: GCA has published a manual transfer runbook for the planned one-time 10,000 GCA member benefit.
The planned transfer requires support review, member ledger approval, 30-day holding-period verification, and a fresh read-only balance check.
If approved, the member benefit must come from project or owner-held reserve transfer only, not new minting.
The public runbook defines manual operator controls and does not make the benefit self-service claimable.
doNotClaim: the 10,000 GCA member benefit is self-service claimable today
holding 1,000,000 GCA automatically triggers a transfer
the member benefit is newly minted
the member benefit is cash, income, reimbursement, trading permission, voting control, lifetime access, price support, or a way to bypass risk controls
approval timing or transfer timing is promised before support and ledger review
